entity.label: Dinhabah
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Robbers’ den, an Edomitish city, the capital of king Bela (Gen. 36:32). It is probably the modern Dibdiba, a little north-east of Petra.

nodes.label: Dinhabah
nodes.description: Robbers’ den, an Edomitish city, the capital of king Bela (Gen. 36:32). It is probably the modern Dibdiba, a little north-east of Petra.

verses.text: And Bela the son of Beor reigned in Edom: and the name of his city was Dinhabah.
Now these are the kings that reigned in the land of Edom before any king reigned over the children of Israel; Bela the son of Beor: and the name of his city was Dinhabah.
